patterns_recognized: Pick-column verbatim rule: Claude Brain misread CHW@DET pick as CHW on both 06-19 and 06-20 by inferring from signals rather than the CSV column — corrected today by reading 'pick' field first before any signal analysis.

NYM@PHI OVERRIDE validated 06-20 (PHI 15-3): model D-grade NYM + elite PHI home SP + multiple PHI OWNER BvP vs opposing SP + market pricing PHI >63% = OVERRIDE to PHI. Today's triple-OWNER profile (Harper, Bohm, Sosa each with 11-28 PA vs Peterson) with Wheeler at 1.78 xERA gap is an even stronger repeat.

f5_full_delta >= 0.18 + single F-signal = insufficient Stage-2 rescue: CLE@HOU 06-20 (F3=4674, f5d=0.22) lost 8-1 to Stage 1. When delta is extreme (>0.18) and only one F-series fires, treat as equivalent to no-F for SKIP decisions.

Coors Field nullifies SP and bullpen model advantages: PIT@COL 06-20, Skenes F1_xera_gap=6.16 at pick_prob=0.82 — COL won 2-1. Park effect overrides xERA and F5_bullpen_gap signals at altitude; DOWNGRADE PIT picks at COL regardless of single-F signal strength.

CIN @ NYY.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 fired at -4.24pp (negative edge) and HARD CAP 10 fired on pick_prob=0.548 in the bottom bucket, collapsing the pre-cap B+ to grade C. CIN@NYY has played three consecutive days; yesterday Will Warren imploded for a 10-2 loss despite an identical F1+F3+F5 stack. Today's away SP Chase Burns (CIN) provides no reason to override the caps. Market has priced NYY's advantage past the model. CONFIRM SKIP.

MIL @ ATL.reasoning: HARD CAP 10 fired on pick_prob=0.528 in the marginal (0.50, 0.55] band, reducing pre-cap B (score=2) to grade C. Only F3_swing_take_gap=3732.9 fires; no F1, F2, or SP edge signal. MIL away SP Gasser faces ATL home SP Elder; ATL BvP vs Gasser is mostly NO_DATA. The 06-20 postgame confirmed ATL won 4-3 as the directional pick but CAP 10 correctly blocked staking. CONFIRM SKIP.

WSH @ TB.reasoning: WSH@TB went WIN 06-19 then LOSS 06-20 — consecutive-day coin-flip pattern in a one-run game. HARD CAP 7 fired on hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0236, correctly reducing pre-cap B+ to B-. Rule layer says Stage 1/2 agree (delta=0.09); F5_bullpen_gap=+0.88 fires; edge=+8.66pp is positive and in-range. Nick Martinez (TB home SP) vs Andrew Alvarez (WSH). No qualitative trigger for DOWNGRADE beyond the already-applied CAP 7. CONFIRM low-stake B-.

CHW @ DET.reasoning: Pick column: DET (verbatim — Claude Brain misread as CHW on 06-19 and 06-20, not repeating today). DET has won this matchup 2 consecutive days. Grade B- from F5_bullpen_gap=+0.62 and PQI Δ=+3.5 with Stage 1/2 disagree penalty (Δ=0.14) already applied. DET home batters Carpenter and Greene are OWNERs vs Davis Martin (shrunk 0.795 and 0.771, 11-12 PA). confidence_downgrade=True and acute_roster noted; no hard caps fired beyond the built-in disagree penalty. CONFIRM B-.

SF @ MIA.reasoning: Prior SF@MIA losses (06-19 GOLD LOSS, 06-20 D-SKIP LOSS) both had f5d≥0.20 and no F-series. Today's profile is materially different: f5d=0.090 (Stage 1/2 agree), F5_bullpen_gap=+0.65 fires, Logan Webb (elite SP) pitching away, SF bullpen xwOBA advantage (hl_gap=-0.0196). Grade B (score=2), edge=+4.91pp. MIA BvP vs Webb is all SMALL_SAMPLE with low shrunk OPS. No caps fired. CONFIRM GOLD B.

CLE @ HOU.reasoning: Exact replay of 06-20 CLE@HOU: that pick had f5d=0.22 and single F3 signal, CLE won 8-1. Today Stage 1 gives HOU only 20.02% in F5 (f5_full_delta=0.348, largest on slate), PQI is AGAINST pick (Δ=-7.5), negative edge (-6.70pp), and grade D pre-cap. Only F3=4343.4 fires. Per 06-20 lesson, f5d≥0.18 + single F-signal = SKIP. CONFIRM D SKIP.

STL @ KC.reasoning: Tier SKIP with no F-series signals. HARD CAP 10 reduced pre-cap B- (score=1) to grade C. confidence_downgrade=True. STL batters show SMALL_SAMPLE BvP vs Kolek (Wetherholt shrunk 0.989, Burleson shrunk 0.914) but neither hits MEANINGFUL threshold. Positive edge=+5.53pp is the only supporting argument; insufficient to lift a no-F SKIP against a marginal bottom-bucket pick. CONFIRM SKIP.

SD @ TEX.reasoning: HARD CAP 6 fired at edge=+32.2pp (calibrator hallucination >25pp) — market prices TEX at 79.4% (fair_prob=0.206 for SD). Stage 1 gives TEX 67.98% in F5. confidence_downgrade=True, bullpen_fatigue stress, f5_full_delta=0.208. Manny Machado (MEANINGFUL, 20 PA) has shrunk OPS 0.692 vs Eovaldi — slightly below average. No qualitative basis to challenge TEX's dominant market position. CONFIRM SKIP.

PIT @ COL.reasoning: Coors Field pattern: 06-20, PIT pick_prob=0.82 with Skenes F1=6.16 xERA — COL won 2-1; park effect overrode elite SP. Today's B+ is built on a single signal (F5_bullpen_gap=+1.67) with no SP edge, confidence_downgrade=True, and external_modifiers stress. Bryan Reynolds (PIT #3 hitter) is WEAK_VS Lorenzen with a meaningful 18-PA sample (shrunk OPS 0.628). Coors inflates run scoring, neutralizing bullpen advantages. DOWNGRADE to SKIP.

MIN @ ARI.reasoning: PENDING_SP_DATA: Jose Cabrera (ARI) has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date; the 100-pitch minimum for xERA scoring is not met. No pick possible. Protocol correctly withholds direction. No qualitative information available to override the structural data-quality hold. CONFIRM SKIP.

LAA @ OAK.reasoning: Stage 1 gives OAK 77.72% in F5 (f5_full_delta=0.304, second-largest on slate). HARD CAP 7 fired on hl_gap=+0.0022 and HARD CAP 10 on pick_prob=0.527 — dual-cap fire. F1_xera_gap=2.26* has asterisk (thin Statcast sample). LAA batters Adell and Schanuel show SMALL_SAMPLE OPS 0.0 vs Perkins (shrunk 0.655/0.635). Per 06-19/06-20 lessons, extreme f5d + thin F1* + bottom-bucket = SKIP. CONFIRM SKIP.

BAL @ LAD.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 fired at -4.27pp; market prices LAD at 72.3% (fair_prob=0.723) — market is MORE confident than the model's 68.03%. Pre-cap A- (score=4) with F2+F3=7809.5+SP edge 0.54+PQI+16.8+Stage agree — strong signal stack but no edge value. Pattern from 06-17/06-19: market absorbs LAD advantages past model; direction correct but staking unwarranted. BAL BvP vs Sheehan is SMALL_SAMPLE only (Ward 3 PA, Henderson 3 PA). CONFIRM B-.

BOS @ SEA.reasoning: Pre-cap A (score=5, maximum): F3=3614+SP edge 1.36 agrees with BOS (Tolle xERA better than Gilbert per model)+PQI-19.5+Stage agree Δ=0.05+edge=+10.17pp — all five grade dimensions fire positively. HARD CAP 10 reduced to grade C (pick_prob=0.546 bottom bucket). BOS has won BOS@SEA the last two days (6-2 on 06-19, 5-1 on 06-20). Jarren Duran is OWNER vs Gilbert (11 PA, shrunk 0.839). CAP 10 CONFIRM exception: pre-cap A with full multi-signal alignment rescues as low-conviction stake. CONFIRM GOLD.

NYM @ PHI.reasoning: Override model's D-grade NYM pick to PHI. Near-identical to 06-20 (PHI won 15-3 on identical structural thesis): Zack Wheeler (PHI home SP, 1.78 xERA advantage over Peterson — larger gap than 06-20's 0.78) + market prices PHI at 64.46% + Stage 1 gives PHI 84.76% F5 + pre_cap=-4 (worst grade). Three PHI OWNERs vs Peterson with meaningful samples: Harper (28 PA, shrunk 0.886), Bohm (27 PA, shrunk 0.864), Sosa (11 PA, shrunk 0.986). Market+SP+triple-OWNER all contradicting the model is the validated OVERRIDE thesis.
